spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing with Bento Grids and The Control Room strategy for Player
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: MODE A: THE TETRIS GRID for Home and About. MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID for Player and Shows.

surfaces_and_effects.tracing_beam: Dynamic border with neon cyan gradient moving around critical cards like 'Trending Now'.

hero.description: Hero with full-screen 3D canvas overlaying dark void. `<Float>`ing Butterfly DNA Helix using React Three Fiber. Massive `<h1 className="text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-black tracking-tighter">`.

radio_player.description: Fixed bottom Glassmorphism bar. Custom sliders for volume/timeline using neon cyan track. Fake visualizer with audio-reactive bars. Use Lucide icons for play/pause/skip.

cards.description: Hover effects: `-translate-y-2`, `shadow-[0_10px_40px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)]`, border turns to `border-cyan-500/50`. Used for 'Gems', 'Prospectors'.

buttons.description: Solid black bg, neon cyan border `border-cyan-500`, neon text. Hover: add inner glow or invert to cyan bg with black text.

home.name: The Wake
home.description: 3D Canvas Hero, Butterfly DNA Helix, call to action 'Mine the Frequency'.

home.name: Gems & Diamonds
home.description: Bento Grid of trending songs. Each song shows 'temperature' %, 'ears' (listens), and 'likes'. Uses tracing beam effect.

home.name: Metamorphosis
home.description: Transformation/Ripples thematic block with scroll-triggered text reveal.

radio.name: The Refinery
radio.description: Audio player UI, visualizer, tracklist. High density 'Control Room' grid.

shows.name: Catalysts
shows.description: Floating 3D album art cards and DJ avatars using Drei's PresentationControls.

schedule.name: Mining Timeline
schedule.description: List of upcoming shows with neon timeline indicators.

about.name: Butterfly Effect
about.description: Lore and mission, heavy text with JetBrains Mono accents, glitch text effects.

3d_guidelines.hero_object: Use `<Float>` and `<PresentationControls>` for rotating Butterfly/DNA Waveform.
3d_guidelines.background: Use `<Points>` or `<Instances>` for floating particles (The Yield). Optional neon grid floor via Three.js GridHelper.
3d_guidelines.lighting: Use dark ambient light, `<SpotLight>` with neon pink (#FF007F) and cyan (#00F0FF) pointing at the hero object.
3d_guidelines.cards: Use Framer Motion 3D or R3F HTML to render floating 3D album art that tilts on mousemove (Parallax).

ui_animations.glitch: CSS keyframes for glitch effects on headings.
ui_animations.hover: All interactive elements MUST have transition effects. Explicit hover text colors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement dark mode cyberpunk theme. Use .js/.jsx extensions ONLY. Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., data-testid='play-radio-button'). Implement 3D elements using @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei. Do not use Inter or Roboto fonts. Stick to Unbounded, Outfit, and JetBrains Mono. Use framer-motion for UI interactions. Use lucide-react for icons. Apply glassmorphism on top of the 3D canvas so the 3D scene acts as the background.
